evidence.text: challenging rewarding projects with tons of variety to choose your own adventure from reasonable employer matching and pto based on tenure but salary depends on the contract ceiling or the company vertical accounts groups you're getting hired from work-life balance entirely depends on the team you're under as well - i've seen different ends of the spectrum during my time where a commercial-client team works beyond n...

booz allen hamilton offers strong career growth opportunities with access to training programs certifications and mentorship the company emphasizes work-life balance with flexible arrangements and fosters a collaborative and inclusive environment employees work on meaningful projects in areas like defense and data analytics supported by a comprehensive benefits package its reputation and stability in government cont...

booz allen hamilton bah is an exceptional company that provides numerous resources for personal and professional growth it offers a supportive environment for consultants to develop critical skills and advance in their careers bah is dedicated to investing in its employees providing opportunities for continuous learning leadership development and growth within the firm the company also offers support for higher educ...
opportunity for career growth and success

my immediate team and direct manager were incredibly supportive and genuinely cared about my growth and success flexible work hours and solid benefits package company brand and name recognition can open doors

pros 1 professional development booz allen offers a strong emphasis on learning and development with resources for upskilling training programs and certifications employees often have access to programs that can help them grow in their fields 2 diverse project opportunities working at booz allen allows exposure to a variety of projects especially for government and defense clients this can be beneficial for employee...

1 career growth and development booz allen hamilton is known for its strong emphasis on employee development as a systems administrator you may have access to various training opportunities certifications and career advancement programs there are also ample opportunities to work with cutting-edge technologies and on large-scale projects which can help enhance your technical skills and experience 2 collaborative envi...

booz allen is an exceptional company to work for offering a dynamic and collaborative environment where innovation and career growth are genuinely valued the company provides a great work-life balance with flexibility that helps employees meet both professional and personal goals leadership is supportive and actively promotes career development providing resources and opportunities for learning new skills

working at booz allen hamilton has been a fantastic experience the company offers a collaborative and inclusive environment where employees are encouraged to bring their unique perspectives to the table the leadership is supportive and genuinely invests in the growth and development of their teams providing ample opportunities for professional advancement additionally the company offers a great work-life balance com...

the company is extremely extremely focused on work life balance lots of ability to move positions or change specialties based on your interest think moving from project management to data science or vice versa if you want to put in the work you can move to any type of discipline you're interested in lots of opportunity to take training in any discipline you want great company to come to if you want to pivot careers...
great benefits healthcare and paid time off
benefits pay education benefits health benefits
they are the it company for your resume it helps a lot if you are looking to grow great people decent benefits and good pay
work friendly supportive team members great education benefits for career benefits
good benefits good pay good wlb friendly people to work with and leadership

great colleagues project teams are generally collaborative and most people at the firm are friendly and easy to talk to in terms of networking admin team support is really helpful and is super super important in terms of your journey at the firm i will say admin team support varies by team i've had great experiences with my admin team but i know other who've had less consistent support

good pay and benefits coming from a non-government sector most of the employees are very kind helpful and friendly many networking opportunities generous bench time and resources the work being done in the field is really phenomenal it's cool to be a part of such important projects and gives you a great sense of pride i think there are many pros to working at booz allen

- for former military bah has open positions for nearly every mos across the board from 18e to 74a - once you are an employee of the company management can go above and beyond to support you whether it is further educational support or even transitional help

booz allen is a large firm with incredible resources opportunities and benefits my time with the company began in the denver office where i had an outstanding experience the culture leadership and sense of community made it a great place to work and grow as a project manager i felt truly supported and part of a team that valued innovation and collaboration
good community benefits work environment and interesting work with flexibility to move around
- excellent job security with clearance - a multitude of different projects to move between - genuinely nice coworkers - generally telework friendly when clients allow

- high pay - job security required a ts sci clearance - flexibility with what i could perform on the job i was allowed to dabble in other areas like management and leadership as i expressed interest in those - the pace of work wasn't super fast-paced but at the same time there was a lot to do so this helped balance out to a good level of work

you can work your 40 hours and get promoted consistently i would rate this firm at the opposite end of the spectrum vs deloitte at the low to mid levels this job is incredibly non-competitive internally your teammates and leads all want to help you grow historically this has been a very stable job for anyone under the 'executive' level sr associate above the firm historically tries to look out for its people clearan...
opportunity to up-skill bench enables you to find new staffing in-between projects non-toxic and friendly work culture 4 weeks of pto
i love my team has been a very supportive environment that has allowed me to grow a lot as a developer

every employees experience is different i didn't have the best time but i've seen others thrive here its contracting so that's the nature of it if you cant find a billable project in some floating amount of time they will separate
no sign on bonus no yearly bonus
not paid what others are too much change
can't really think of any
-low pay -sometimes long hours
too many useless corporate emails about people i don't and will likley never know
not the highest paying placem

not a lot of growth and professional development opportunities once your in the company it's like drinking from a fire hose i've met people at this company that have worked 3 years and have not been promoted or move up in the company in any way compensation isn't as good either you're better off working at a competitor after working more than a year here
not as good of benefits as deloitte and other large competitors easy to get lost in such a big company not a clear picture of where to go next
slightly lower pay you have to find your own projects level of satisfaction is heavily dependent project and management
pay is not competitive with other industry players but pays off in terms of work life balance mentioned above
lower pay work not very interesting
pay does not match market value

a few cons 1 pay while it s easy to get your first promotion which would come with a 10-15 raise your pay can be pretty stagnant for a while they give annual raises 2-5 but with no annual bonus until you reach senior associate lvl 5 which some people never reach you will likely be underpaid for a while i have seen people come from other companies though and get a really good offer but i d only consider it good if yo...
i do not have any cons

my admin team unfortunately has some very toxic leadership practices feedback is not provided before adverse action it s not safe to provide feedback because you will risk retaliation also the pay could be better
there is toxic office politics
lack of accountability for bad performers
the layoffs proved that the people-first motto did not apply to most of its workforce

managers aren't honest with employees 2 500 employees get layoff in 2025 for poor management and they knows managers showing favoritism for certain employees vs humiliating new ones working for booz is like getting into a country club with a very narrow social circle it's really hard been accepted
career manager not supportive in job search
underwhelming medical benefits substantial range of salaries for the same positions regardless of background poor inconsistent internal recruiting practices
projects stop abruptly leads and project people don't know technology often will have people unrelated to project in meetings -just to bill hours
software heavy they hire a large range of majors but may not be ideal for those not interested in a tech it field

despite what people may say being a current employee does not benefit you when it comes to internal contract transfers the mobility coaches might try to tell you that being a current employee will give you a leg up but it really doesn't your transfer application is treated the exact same as a new job applicant
